## Description

**New and absorbs better than ever!**

**Q²M SilkDryer EVO** is an enhanced version of one of the most innovative drying towels. Compared to the version introduced in 2015, the EVO variant has a higher grams per m² count of 530. The total absorption is up to 50% higher than before. The edges have been reduced to an absolute minimum to make the towel even more functional and safer for complex-shaped panels.

Drying has never been easier! With Q²M SilkDryer EVO, you can rely on an unmatched drying experience and a flawless finish. The redesigned twisted synthetic fibers absorb moisture like never before, leaving your vehicle dry in no time. No streaks, no drops, just a shiny and impeccable finish.

Whether you're a professional detailer or simply want to care for your own car, Q²M SilkDryer EVO offers the perfect combination of functionality and quality. With its improved absorption capacity and minimalist design, this drying towel ensures even the most hard-to-reach surfaces can be safely and thoroughly dried.

Choose the ultimate drying experience and let Q²M SilkDryer EVO leave your car sparkling and dry in an instant. Get ready for a new standard in car drying!

## Specifications

Faster, Safer, Better

Absorbs Like Never Before!

Quick dry, no hassle.

## Improved Absorption

The Q²M SilkDryer EVO now absorbs up to 50% more moisture than before, thanks to the advanced synthetic fibers. This makes drying faster and more efficient, so your car is dry in no time.

![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/e3/6a/b8/1735652820/DSC01090.jpg?ts=1735652820)

![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/d3/04/ac/1735652859/DSC01097.jpg?ts=1735652859)

Dry without worries.

## Safe and Smooth Drying

Thanks to the ultra-smooth design of the Q²M SilkDryer EVO, drying is a safe experience with no risk of scratches or marring, even on the softest paintwork. Complex surfaces are effortlessly and safely dried.

Gloss without streaks.

## Streak-Free Finish

The Q²M SilkDryer EVO delivers a flawless finish without streaks or droplets, ensuring a shiny result. Whether you have a coated or uncoated car, you can rely on an impeccable drying experience.

![image](https://cdn.qso.eu/media/6f/ff/65/1735652940/DSC01089.jpg?ts=1735652940)
